_comment: Example profile for MIMIC-IV-Ext-CLIF — the MIMIC->CLIF conversion, release v1.1.0, which implements the CLIF 2.x spec. STANDARD: clif_version records the CLIF SPEC version (2.1.0 here, same family as UChicago) — that is what cross-site pooling keys on. The MIMIC->CLIF conversion/dataset release (1.1.0) is recorded SEPARATELY as dataset_version; never put it in clif_version and never call it 'CLIF 1.1.0'. Copy to sites/mimic.json (gitignored) and set data_path to your local MIMIC-IV-Ext-CLIF directory. Run: ./run_bundle.sh --site mimic. NOTE timezone UTC — MIMIC *_dttm are UTC and date-shifted, so temporal-trend axes are not real calendar dates (all-time/distributional comparisons are valid). All 4 metrics run as-is; vocabulary matches the canonical definitions/ with no overrides.
